spec.description: Profiling performance-related metrics based on controller-runtime.

spec.title: Backlog Pressure
spec.description: Positive means the queue is growing. Negative means the controller is draining backlog.

spec.title: Average Queue Wait Duration
spec.description: Good next to p95/p99 to distinguish general slowness from spikes.

spec.title: Queue Retries / Second
spec.description: Spikes here usually mean reconcile errors, conflicts, or rate-limited requeues.

spec.title: Worker Saturation
spec.description: If this is close to 1 while queue depth and queue wait rise, the controller is worker-saturated.

spec.title: Longest Running Processor
spec.description: This grows when work is still in-flight. If it grows continuously, suspect stuck reconciles or long API calls.

spec.title: Unfinished Work Seconds
spec.description: This grows when work is still in-flight. If it grows continuously, suspect stuck reconciles or long API calls.

spec.title: Kubernetes API Client Requests
spec.description: This is useful to see whether Capsule is generating a high API call rate.

spec.title: Kubernetes API Client Request Duration p95
Controller Runtime Controllers
